SimulatorPage.heading: TandaOmni Simulator
SimulatorPage.subtitle: Estimate your zero-interest, community-funded savings plan. Built for the Diplomado de Desarrollo y Optimización de Sitios Web 1° — UNAM, by Christopher Guzman.

realEstate.label: Real Estate
realEstate.mitigation: Legal Deed Trust (Reserva de Dominio) required. Your deed is held in trust until the group completes all payments.

vehicle.label: Vehicle / Equipment
vehicle.mitigation: Mandatory platform-held insurance policy required throughout the entire group term — regardless of whether the vehicle is new or used.

travel.label: Travel & Experiences
travel.mitigation: Escrow Lock: Payout releases only after 60% of the current asset cost is funded. A credit card pre-authorization hold will be placed.

SimulatorPage.escrowNote: Payout releases once contributions reach 60% of the current asset cost.
SimulatorPage.emptyState: Enter an asset price above to see your simulation.
SimulatorPage.bankInterestNotice: A traditional loan charges interest on the financed balance for the full term — money paid on top of the asset price.
SimulatorPage.savingsNote: Total saved versus a traditional bank loan over the same term.

explain.priceLabelGText: The base value of the asset you want to acquire. This is the goal amount your tanda group will collectively fund. All monthly payments, downpayment amounts, and projections are derived from this figure.
explain.termText: The total duration of your savings group in months. Each month, one member receives the full group payout. Longer terms produce smaller monthly payments but increase exposure to price changes over time.
explain.deltaText: The estimated annual rate at which the asset's price changes. Positive for appreciating assets like real estate (+4%–+6%). For vehicles, the direction depends on what you are buying: positive (+3%–+6%) if targeting a brand-new model (tracks MSRP inflation each model year), or negative (−5%–10%) if targeting a specific used vehicle (tracks depreciation while it ages in the queue). This rate is used to calculate your fixed monthly payment and the projected asset price at term end.
explain.downpaymentText: An upfront payment as a percentage of the target price, paid before the group begins. It reduces the monthly burden for all members and secures your position in the payout queue.
explain.monthlyPaymentText: Your fixed monthly contribution. Calculated by averaging the changing asset price across the full term: P = [G × (1 + δ × T/2) − G × d] / M. Every member pays this same amount regardless of when they receive their payout.
explain.downpaymentRequiredText: The actual dollar amount of your downpayment (G × d). This must be paid upfront to activate your position in the group's payout queue.
explain.groupSizeText: The number of participants in your tanda group. Group size is independent of the term and does NOT change your monthly payment - in a ROSCA every member funds exactly one asset, so the payment is set by the term alone. Instead, group size controls the payout cadence: a smaller group funds members less often (a larger payout, spaced further apart), while a larger group funds members more frequently.
explain.payoutCadenceText: How often the group funds a member's asset. The group buys N assets over the term (one per member), so payouts happen every M / N months. A smaller group means fewer, more widely spaced payouts; a larger group means more frequent ones. Your own wait depends on your position in the queue.
explain.assetPriceAtEndText: The projected price of the asset at the end of the full term, calculated using the Delta Curve: G₂ = G × (1 + δ)^T. This represents what the last member in the payout queue will pay for their asset.
explain.totalContributedText: The total amount each member pays over the full term: (P × M) + downpayment. Because TandaOmni charges zero interest, this closely matches the original asset price — your community funds each other at no cost.
explain.escrowText: For travel & experiences (unrecoverable assets), your payout is locked until your total contributions reach 60% of the current asset cost. This protects the group against funding an experience that cannot be refunded if a member defaults.
explain.bankAprText: The annual percentage rate a traditional lender charges on the financed balance. Defaults reflect US June 2026 averages (mortgage ~6.5%, new auto ~7%, used auto ~12%, travel/personal loan ~14%). Adjust the slider to match a quote you've received.
explain.bankFinancedText: The portion of the asset price the bank lends you: the target price minus your downpayment. Interest accrues on this balance.
explain.bankTotalInterestText: The total interest paid to the bank over the full term: (monthly payment × months) − amount financed. This is pure cost on top of the asset — exactly what TandaOmni eliminates.
explain.bankTotalCostText: Everything you pay through the bank: downpayment + (monthly payment × months). Compare this against TandaOmni's Total Contributed to see your savings.

AnalysisPage.heading: TandaOmni — Product Analysis
AnalysisPage.subtitle: A zero-interest, community-funded financial ecosystem supporting Real Estate, Vehicles, and Experiences. Built for the Diplomado de Desarrollo y Optimización de Sitios Web 1° — UNAM.

overview.objective: A zero-interest, community-funded financial ecosystem (ROSCA/Tanda model) supporting Real Estate (Appreciating), Vehicles/Equipment (Destructible), and Experiences (Unrecoverable).
overview.courseValue: Diplomado de Desarrollo y Optimización de Sitios Web 1° — UNAM
overview.body: The platform dynamically groups users into specific risk tiers based on the asset class they are funding.

t1.name: Real Estate (Appreciating Asset)
t1.mitigation: 15% Downpayment, Legal Deed Trust (Reserva de Dominio).

t2.name: Vehicles & Commercial Equipment (Depreciating / Destructible)
t2.mitigation: 20% Downpayment, Mandatory Platform-Held Insurance Policy (regardless of delta direction).

t3.name: Travel & Experiences (Unrecoverable)
t3.mitigation: Escrow Lock — Payout only releases after user contributes 60% of total goal. Credit Card Pre-authorization.
